text: Excited to share that my new 3D technical portfolio is officially live! 🚀 Integrating interactive sandboxes and real-time GitHub/LinkedIn sync to showcase my journey in Cybersecurity and Full-Stack Engineering. Check it out at chaitanya-sahu.vercel.app #Portfolio #NextJS #FramerMotion #Web3

Deeply engaged in advanced VAPT research! 🛡️ Successfully completed a specialized security audit for a campus infrastructure. Continuous learning is the key to staying ahead in the cyber threat landscape. #CyberSecurity #VAPT #InfoSec #Research

Just wrapped up my second Cybersecurity Internship at Adiroha Solutions! 🛡️ Successfully performed network penetration testing and security audits for three major client environments. Moving one step closer to becoming a specialized security architect. #CyberSecurity #VAPT #InfoSec #InternshipSuccess

Deployed a real-time AI Security Dashboard today! 🧠 Leveraging LLMs to detect anomalous behavior in web traffic. This project combines my passion for Full-Stack development with proactive threat hunting. The tech stack: Next.js, FastAPI, and OpenAI. #AI #CyberSecurity #FullStack #Python

Honored to receive the 'Top Performer' award at the 2026 AI Workshop - AAVISHKAR! 🏆 Deep diving into computer vision and Haar cascades for facial recognition. Special thanks to the faculty at @GVPT for the guidance. #AI #MachineLearning #Award #GVPT

Completed the Infosys Springboard AI & ML certification! 🧠 This course provided deep insights into neural networks and data engineering. Looking forward to implementing these concepts in my upcoming security projects. #NeverStopLearning #Infosys #AI #ML
